questions.question:
Describe the process by which an image is formed in a camera, highlighting the role of the lens and sensor.

(10 marks)

What is the term used to describe the amount of light falling on an image sensor, and how does it affect image quality?

(5 marks)

Explain how the concept of 'grey level' applies to photometric images, and provide an example of a real-world application.

(10 marks)
